# External Context Builders

> **External data sources and integrations**

This folder contains builders that integrate external data - biometrics, calendar, financial data, device context, etc.

## Builders

| Builder | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| `biometrics.ts` | Health and biometric data |
| `financial-prediction.ts` | Financial context and predictions |
| `anticipation.ts` | Anticipatory awareness |
| `personal-journey.ts` | Life journey tracking |
| `macos-context.ts` | macOS menubar app desktop context |
| `outbound-call-context.ts` | On-behalf call awareness |
| `pending-call-results.ts` | Results from pending calls |

## Integration Philosophy

External data should enhance the conversation naturally, not feel like surveillance. We reveal capabilities gradually and with user consent.

## Related

- `awareness/` - Situational awareness that may use external data
- `intelligence/` - Pattern detection across external sources
